thesis_hint: Recent 3-cycle quality is improving again (BABY stoch flush 0.0000 -> BABY adx reclaim 0.0000 -> VVV v7 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Stay on BABY 1h because funding is still deeply negative (-0.00210) with strong volume and OI, but avoid both failed BABY shapes: no raw stoch flush momentum and no broad ADX reclaim. Design a tighter liquidation-reclaim long that only triggers after a washout low, reclaim above a fast anchor, and confirmation that ranging PF can stay above 1.05 while transitional bleed is actively filtered out.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 20 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, ranging profit_factor < 1.05, or transitional profit_factor < 0.95.
